achievements.title: Hack for Hire 2026 Winner
achievements.description: Won 1st place out of 50+ teams at the Hack for Hire hackathon organized by Vulcan Learning Collective at the Anvesana & IT-BT Karnataka 36-hour hackathon. This win directly led to an internship offer from Vulcan Learning Collective LLP.
achievements.organizer: Vulcan Learning Collective / Anvesana & IT-BT Karnataka
achievements.outcome: Led to internship offer at Vulcan Learning Collective LLP

achievements.title: FOSS Hackathon Winner – Xrepo
achievements.description: Won 1st place out of 50+ teams at the FOSS (localhost) Hackathon for Xrepo, an open-source collaborative quantum circuit platform. Represented PESITM at the Pan-India ADVAYA Hackathon at BGSCET Bengaluru.
achievements.outcome: Represented PESITM at Pan-India ADVAYA Hackathon, BGSCET Bengaluru

achievements.title: HACK MALENADU National Hackathon Finalist
achievements.description: Secured 4th place among 150 finalist teams selected from 2,346+ national registrations at HACK MALENADU National Hackathon.

achievements.title: 100/100 in Mathematics-I (VTU)
achievements.description: Achieved a perfect score of 100/100 in Mathematics-I under Visvesvaraya Technological University.

achievements.title: 100/100 in Mathematics-II (VTU)
achievements.description: Achieved a perfect score of 100/100 in Mathematics-II under Visvesvaraya Technological University.

achievements.title: Project Exhibition Certification – First Prize
achievements.description: Earned first prize at the college project exhibition for exceptional performance.

achievements.title: ADVAYA Pan-India Hackathon Representative
achievements.description: Represented PESITM at the ADVAYA Pan-India Hackathon held at BGSCET Bengaluru after winning the FOSS Hackathon.

achievements.title: Monaithon Hackathon Top 40 Finalist
achievements.description: Selected as a top 40 finalist team in Monaithon Hackathon 2025.

achievements.title: Google Cloud Agentic AI Day Certificate
achievements.description: Participated in Google Cloud Agentic AI Day, exploring next-generation AI innovations and agentic AI systems.

achievements.title: Hands-On Workshop on RAG Model
achievements.description: Participated in a hands-on workshop on Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) models, enhancing practical AI skills.

achievements.title: Leadership Session with Zoho Global Head
achievements.description: Part of a leadership session with Zoho Global Head Kuppulakshmi Krishnamoorthy.
